message:
feat(server,tui): add TUI spin watchdog, sqlite auto-recovery, and highlight fix

Server startup changes:
- Add TUI spin watchdog that monitors /proc CPU usage during the startup
  window (default 180s). If sustained CPU exceeds the threshold (default
  250%) for the sustained window (default 20s), the TUI is detached and
  the server continues headless. Metrics exposed via tui_spin_watchdog_*
  counters for observability.
- Add sqlite auto-recovery on search backfill failure: when backfill
  hits a corruption/recovery-class error, attempt automatic sqlite
  repair (with archive-aware fallback) then retry once.
- Bound startup dashboard event drain to 128 events per cycle and bump
  poll timeout from 0ms to 1ms to prevent hot terminal event streams
  from starving HTTP/tool work.

TUI application changes:
- Switch default tick strategy from Predictive to ActiveOnly; the model
  now installs a project-level tiered cadence strategy on init via
  Cmd::set_tick_strategy.
- Add headless detach support via TuiSharedState::request_headless_detach.

Style/clippy fixes across worker modules (ack_ttl, cleanup, disk_monitor,
integrity_guard, retention, tool_metrics): replace closure-based
PoisonError unwrap with method reference std::sync::PoisonError::into_inner.

Mail UI: fix highlight_snippet to operate on unescaped text intervals
before HTML-escaping, preventing corruption of HTML entities and <mark>
tags. Overlapping highlight intervals are now merged.

TUI screens: formatting and layout adjustments in dashboard, contacts,
and timeline screens. Action menu and tui_app receive additional
rendering and state management improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
